steps.description: Create documentation file WORKFLOW_CALLS.md listing all reusable workflow names, required inputs, and example invocations
steps.self_check: file exists and contains markdown headings for each workflow

steps.description: Standardize boolean workflow inputs to snake_case (e.g., skip-relevance-check) across all .github/workflows/*.yaml files
steps.input: List of workflow YAML files via grep pattern '\.yaml' in .github/workflows
steps.output: All boolean inputs renamed consistently; corresponding references updated
steps.self_check: grep for camelCase or kebab-case boolean inputs yields no results

steps.description: Add missing description fields for 'ref' input and other extra inputs in all workflow_dispatch sections
steps.input: Search for workflow_dispatch blocks lacking description for inputs
steps.output: All inputs in workflow_dispatch have a 'description' field
steps.self_check: grep for 'workflow_dispatch' sections where 'inputs' entries miss a 'description' key returns zero

steps.description: Add a lightweight lint/assertion script (e.g., scripts/check-gating-block.sh) that verifies the shared if‑gating block is identical across all workflows and fails CI if drift is detected
steps.output: New script added and referenced in CI workflow (e.g., actionlint job)
steps.self_check: Run script locally; exits 0 only when all workflows contain identical gating block

steps.description: Update permissions for workflows that currently over‑grant to use fine‑grained token scoped to Contents: write and Pull‑requests: write (replace classic PAT where possible)
steps.input: Identify workflows using secrets.WORKFLOW_PAT where only comment steps need it
steps.output: Permissions blocks simplified; comment‑only steps migrated to workflow_run using GITHUB_TOKEN, PAT retained only for commit‑push paths
steps.self_check: grep for 'secrets.WORKFLOW_PAT' in comment‑only jobs returns none

steps.description: Add CI job to run the gating‑block lint script and enforce variable‑naming consistency
steps.output: CI workflow (e.g., .github/workflows/ci.yaml) includes new job 'gating_check' that fails on drift
steps.self_check: CI config contains job named gating_check

steps.description: Run pre‑commit hooks and CI locally to validate changes; commit all modifications in a single atomic commit
steps.output: All tests pass, CI passes, and repository is clean
steps.self_check: pre‑commit run --all-files returns success and ctest passes
